Name: Azure - Capture AzureRM Virtual Machine Image
Description:
Prepares an AzureRM Virtual Machine (Managed Disk or Storage Account based) and captures a [Managed Image](https://docs.microsoft.com/en-us/azure/virtual-machines/windows/capture-image-resource) or [Image VHD](https://docs.microsoft.com/en-us/azure/virtual-machines/windows/capture-image):
1. Runs Sysprep
2. Deallocates & Generalizes VM
3. Creates Managed Image or Image VHD
4. Removes virtual machine resource group

Parameters.Name: StepTemplate_Account
Parameters.Label: Octopus Azure Account
Parameters.HelpText: Select the [account id](#/accounts) to use for the connection.

Parameters.Name: StepTemplate_ResourceGroupName
Parameters.Label: Resource Group Name
Parameters.HelpText: Name of the Azure Resource Group containing the Virtual Machine.

Parameters.Name: StepTemplate_VMName
Parameters.Label: Virtual Machine Name
Parameters.HelpText: The name of the AzureRM Virtual Machine to capture. This VM will be shut down & generalized.

Parameters.Name: StepTemplate_ImageType
Parameters.Label: Image Type
Parameters.HelpText: Desired type of image to capture from the Virtual Machine.

Parameters.Name: StepTemplate_ImageDest
Parameters.Label: Image Destination
Parameters.HelpText:
Where the image should be created.

**Managed Images** should enter a _Resource Group_ name

**Storage Account VHDs** should enter a _Storage Account_ name

Parameters.Name: StepTemplate_ImageName
Parameters.Label: Image Name
Parameters.HelpText: Name to use when creating the image.

Parameters.Name: StepTemplate_DeleteVMResourceGroup
Parameters.Label: Delete VM Resource Group?
Parameters.HelpText:
Delete the virtual machine resource group after an image has been captured.

**Once a Virtual Machine is marked as generalized Azure will prevent it from being started or modified.**
